description: Legal document. Written and signed by Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. Dated: 1425 Seleucid, which is 1113/14 CE. Sitt al-Kull bt. [...] makes a declaration of some kind in favor of Abū Saʿd b. Durrī (דרי). Goitein's index card: "We learn from this that Durrī is also a name for a free man."
description_he: מסמך משפטי מאת חלפון ב. מנשה, 1425 סלאוקי (1113/14 לספירה), סת אל-כל בת [...] מצהירה לטובת אבו סעד ב. דוראי
